stemHtml:
Given the following information, determine the minimum landing distance that must be available for a multi-engined Performance Class B aeroplane operated for Commercial Air Transport.

Defactored landing distance: 3650 ft
Runway surface: Grass - less than 20 cm long (factor 1.15)
Runway condition: Wet (factor 1.15)
Runway slope: 1% upslope
(The landing distance should be increased by 5% for each 1% downslope.)
